crops.name: Wheat
crops.details: Best grown in winter, requires moderate water.

crops.name: Sugarcane
crops.details: Requires fertile soil and plenty of water.

crops.name: Cotton
crops.details: Grows well with good drainage and adequate moisture.

Alluvial.watering_tips: Moderate watering; avoid waterlogging, especially in rice cultivation.

soil_health.moisture_status: Usually moist but depends on rainfall and irrigation.
soil_health.nutrient_deficiency: Check for nitrogen deficiency; organic compost helps improve soil fertility.

crops.name: Cotton
crops.details: Requires deep, moisture-retentive soil ideal for cotton.

crops.name: Maize
crops.details: Thrives in well-drained black soils with adequate moisture.

crops.name: Tobacco
crops.details: Prefers black soil with good nutrient content.

fertilizers.recommendation: Apply 50kg/ha at planting for root development.
Apply split doses, especially during vegetative growth.

Black.watering_tips: Water deeply but less frequently to maintain moisture without waterlogging.

soil_health.moisture_status: Retains moisture well due to clay content.
soil_health.nutrient_deficiency: May lack nitrogen and phosphorus; soil testing recommended.

crops.name: Rice
crops.details: Ideal for water-intensive crops due to good water retention.

crops.name: Vegetables
crops.details: Clay soil retains nutrients well; good for vegetable cultivation with drainage.

crops.name: Wheat
crops.details: Requires proper drainage to avoid waterlogging.

fertilizers.recommendation: Enhances soil texture and nutrient availability.
Apply based on soil test results; avoid excess nitrogen.

Clay.watering_tips: Ensure good drainage; avoid waterlogging as clay holds water tightly.

soil_health.moisture_status: Can become waterlogged or dry depending on drainage.
soil_health.nutrient_deficiency: May have potassium deficiency; regular fertilization advised.

crops.name: Cotton
crops.details: Requires well-drained soils and consistent moisture.

crops.name: Pulses
crops.details: Good for pulses with proper soil management.

crops.name: Millets
crops.details: Adapted to red soils with low fertility.

fertilizers.recommendation: Apply to reduce soil acidity and improve nutrient uptake.
Enhances soil organic matter and fertility.

Red.watering_tips: Frequent watering needed during dry periods; red soil drains quickly.

soil_health.moisture_status: Drains quickly and can become dry.
soil_health.nutrient_deficiency: May lack nitrogen and humus; add organic matter regularly.
